bc5d17b022ad77cdaff8f06099ac90ad.fixed_content:
@startuml

!define COMPONENT_COLOR #ADD1B2
!define DATABASE_COLOR #C4D7ED
!define EXTERNAL_COLOR #FFD700
!define ACTOR_COLOR #F0F0F0

skinparam component {
  BackgroundColor COMPONENT_COLOR
  BorderColor #7E9E8F
  ArrowColor #4A6980
  ArrowFontColor #4A6980
  FontColor #333333
}
skinparam database {
  BackgroundColor DATABASE_COLOR
  BorderColor #8FAFCB
  FontColor #333333
}
skinparam actor {
  BackgroundColor ACTOR_COLOR
  BorderColor #4A6980
  FontColor #4A6980
}
skinparam package {
  BackgroundColor #F0F0F0
  BorderColor #A0A0A0
  FontColor #333333
}

actor "User" as User

component "SEBI Website" <<external>> as SEBIWebsite EXTERNAL_COLOR

package "Compliance Monitoring Solution" {

  component "Circular Ingestion" <<service>> as CircularIngestion
  component "Document Processing" <<service>> as DocumentProcessing
  component "Requirement Extraction" <<service>> as RequirementExtraction
  component "Compliance Management" <<service>> as ComplianceManagement
  component "Analysis" <<service>> as Analysis
  component "Reporting" <<service>> as Reporting

  database "Raw Circulars Store" <<datastore>> as RawCircularsStore
  database "Parsed Documents Store" <<datastore>> as ParsedDocumentsStore
  database "Compliance Data Store" <<datastore>> as ComplianceDataStore

}

SEBIWebsite --> CircularIngestion : Provides Circulars
CircularIngestion --> RawCircularsStore : Stores Raw Circulars

DocumentProcessing --> RawCircularsStore : Reads Raw Circulars
DocumentProcessing --> ParsedDocumentsStore : Stores Parsed Documents

RequirementExtraction --> ParsedDocumentsStore : Reads Parsed Documents
RequirementExtraction --> ComplianceDataStore : Stores Requirements

ComplianceManagement --> ComplianceDataStore : Manages Compliance Rules & Status
Analysis --> ComplianceDataStore : Reads Compliance Data
Analysis --> ComplianceManagement : Queries Compliance Status
Reporting --> ComplianceDataStore : Reads Compliance Data
Reporting --> Analysis : Consumes Analysis Results

User --> ComplianceManagement : Manages Compliance
User --> Analysis : Initiates Analysis
User --> Reporting : Views Reports

@enduml

3c39e8a2528f3037d6e33e07face110a.fixed_content:
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle

external_system "SEBI" as SEBI
component "Circular Ingestion" as Ingestion
database "Raw Circulars" as RawCirculars
component "Document Parsing" as Parsing
database "Parsed Clauses" as ParsedClauses
component "Requirement Extraction" as Extraction
database "Extracted Requirements" as ExtractedReqs
component "Compliance Gap Analysis" as GapAnalysis
database "Existing Compliance Setup" as ExistingSetup
component "Organizational Impact Assessment" as ImpactAssessment

activate Ingestion
Ingestion -> SEBI : Request Latest Circulars
activate SEBI
SEBI --> Ingestion : Provide Circulars
deactivate SEBI
Ingestion -> RawCirculars : Store Raw Circulars
deactivate Ingestion

activate Parsing
Ingestion -> Parsing : Process New Circulars
Parsing -> RawCirculars : Retrieve Raw Circulars
activate RawCirculars
RawCirculars --> Parsing : Return Raw Circulars
deactivate RawCirculars
Parsing -> ParsedClauses : Store Parsed Clauses
deactivate Parsing

activate Extraction
Parsing -> Extraction : Extract Requirements from Clauses
Extraction -> ParsedClauses : Retrieve Parsed Clauses
activate ParsedClauses
ParsedClauses --> Extraction : Return Parsed Clauses
deactivate ParsedClauses
Extraction -> ExtractedReqs : Store Extracted Requirements
deactivate Extraction

activate GapAnalysis
Extraction -> GapAnalysis : Analyze Compliance Gaps
GapAnalysis -> ExtractedReqs : Retrieve New Requirements
activate ExtractedReqs
ExtractedReqs --> GapAnalysis : Return New Requirements
deactivate ExtractedReqs
GapAnalysis -> ExistingSetup : Query Existing Compliance Setup
activate ExistingSetup
ExistingSetup --> GapAnalysis : Return Existing Setup
deactivate ExistingSetup
deactivate GapAnalysis

activate ImpactAssessment
GapAnalysis -> ImpactAssessment : Assess Organizational Impact (with Gaps)
ImpactAssessment -> ExtractedReqs : Retrieve Requirements for Impact
activate ExtractedReqs
ExtractedReqs --> ImpactAssessment : Return Requirements
deactivate ExtractedReqs
deactivate ImpactAssessment
@enduml
